f file_path.exists():
    content = file_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    word_count = len(content.split())
    lines = content.count('\n') + 1
    print(f"文件验证通过: {file_path.absolute()}")
    print(f"字数: {word_count} (目标400-600)")
    print(f"行数: {lines}")
    print(f"结构检查: {'#' in content and '## ' in content}")
else:
    print("文件不存在")
```
